postReview.title: Inter Miami 4-2 CF Montreal: Messi and Suarez net doubles in six-goal thriller
postReview.description: Lionel Messi and Luis Suarez scored two goals each as Inter Miami snapped a four-game winless streak in MLS by beating CF Montreal 4-2.

preReview.title: Donadel encouraged that Montreal can compete with Inter Miami
preReview.description: Inter Miami have gone four MLS games without a victory, ahead of facing bottom-of-the-table CF Montreal on Wednesday.

QAData.question: Who won between Inter Miami CF and CF Montreal on Wed, 28 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Inter Miami CF won 4–2 over CF Montreal on Wed, 28 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
